title: Comparing Your Real Options for Selling Ebooks in Nigeria Without PayPal — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: In Nigeria, you can't use PayPal to sell ebooks, and this problem goes beyond a single country. Millions of digital creators worldwide face similar restrictions, banking limitations, and KYC requirements that block them from using platforms like Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip. You're not alone. You need a PayPal alternative that lets you connect with buyers directly and get paid instantly, without the hassle of setting up separate payment processors or worrying about compliance. Your customers in Nigeria and elsewhere want to buy from you, but you can't rely on traditional payment gateways. It's time to explore the real options for selling ebooks in Nigeria without PayPal.
What Each Option Actually Offers

When you sell ebooks without PayPal, you're left with a few options. Gumroad, for instance, might seem appealing, but it has its own list of restricted countries, including Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan. Stripe and Payhip aren't much better, as they also have stringent KYC requirements and geographic restrictions. Meanwhile, NOWPayments offers 300+ coins, no KYC, and no buyer account required, but you still need to integrate it with a separate payment processor. Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle ($79.99) provides everything you need to start selling ebooks immediately, including Core Engine, Wallet Connect, and Dashboard, without any of these limitations. It's the complete store infrastructure, one payment.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

Traditional payment platforms often restrict countries due to regulatory or banking limitations. PayPal, for example, has blocked numerous countries, including Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan, to comply with local regulations. Stripe and Payhip follow similar practices, limiting your ability to sell ebooks to customers in restricted countries. NOWPayments, however, provides a more inclusive solution, allowing you to sell to anyone, anywhere, without the need for separate payment processors or KYC checks. Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle ensures that you can connect with buyers globally, without the hassle of restricted countries or payment processor limitations.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When you sell ebooks without PayPal, you need to consider the payment speed, fees, and real costs of each option. Gumroad charges a flat fee of 3.5% + $0.30 per sale, while Stripe and Payhip incur additional fees for international transactions. NOWPayments, on the other hand, offers instant payment processing with no fees for sellers. Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle provides a seamless payment experience, with no hidden fees or restrictions, ensuring that you receive your full payment instantly.
Traditional payment platforms often restrict countries due to regulatory or banking limitations.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

The risk of platform dependency is asymmetric in a specific way that most creators underestimate. When PayPal or Stripe is working, everything seems fine. When it stops working — through suspension, policy change, or geographic restriction enforcement — you lose access to your revenue channel instantly, often with funds already inside the platform that you cannot withdraw. Rebuilding on a new platform takes weeks. The income gap during that period is real money lost. Crypto-native infrastructure removes this asymmetric risk. Your wallet cannot be suspended. Your GitHub Pages store cannot be taken down by a payment platform's compliance team. The infrastructure is under your control from day one, which means no single external decision can cut off your income.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

When choosing an option for selling ebooks in Nigeria without PayPal, consider your specific needs and goals. If you're looking for a complete store infrastructure, one payment, and the ability to connect with buyers globally, Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle ($79.99) is the clear winner. Its automation, delivery capabilities, and seamless payment experience make it the perfect solution for digital creators like you.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
NOWPayments offers instant payment processing with no fees for sellers.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking for more information on selling digital products without PayPal or restricted countries, check out Unchained Commerce's resources at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html. The Full Stack Bundle ($79.99) is the ultimate solution for digital creators like you, offering everything you need to start selling ebooks and products instantly, without the hassle of traditional payment gateways.
Your Action Checklist

Start by accepting that no PayPal or Stripe workaround is durable — the platforms actively close gaps as they discover them. Create a NOWPayments account and configure wallet addresses for USDT on Tron and Bitcoin as your primary coins. Purchase and deploy the Core Shop Engine — it handles payment verification and automated delivery. Configure the Web3 Wallet Connect module with your product details and checkout settings. Upload your digital product files to your delivery server with the paths configured in the engine. Test the complete flow with a real mainnet transaction — send a small amount to your wallet and confirm the webhook fires and the delivery email arrives. Check the Admin Dashboard to confirm the transaction appears in the log. Add your store URL to your social profiles and content channels. You now have infrastructure that no payment platform can take from you.
Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle provides a complete store infrastructure, automation, and delivery capabilities, without any restrictions or limitations.
